en: Now the LORD said to Abram, "Go from your country and your kindred and your father's house to the land that I will show you.
zh: 耶和華對亞伯蘭說： “你要離開本地、本族、父家， 到我指示你的地方去。

en: And I will make of you a great nation, and I will bless you and make your name great, so that you will be a blessing.
zh: 我必使你成為大國， 賜福給你， 使你的名為大， 你也必使別人得福，

en: I will bless those who bless you, and him who dishonors you I will curse, and in you all the families of the earth shall be blessed."
zh: 給你祝福的，我必賜福給他； 咒詛你的，我必咒詛他； 地上的萬族，都必因你得福。”

en: So Abram went, as the LORD had told him, and Lot went with him. Abram was seventy-five years old when he departed from Haran.
zh: 亞伯蘭就照著耶和華吩咐他的去了；羅得也和他同去。亞伯蘭離開哈蘭的時候，已經七十五歲。

en: And Abram took Sarai his wife, and Lot his brother's son, and all their possessions that they had gathered, and the people that they had acquired in Haran, and they set out to go to the land of Canaan. When they came to the land of Canaan,
zh: 亞伯蘭帶著他的妻子撒萊和姪兒羅得以及他們在哈蘭所積蓄的一切財物，和所獲得的人口，一同出來，要到迦南地去。後來他們到了迦南地。

en: Abram passed through the land to the place at Shechem, to the oak of Moreh. At that time the Canaanites were in the land.
zh: 亞伯蘭穿過那地，到了示劍的地方，摩利的橡樹那裡。當時，迦南人住在那地。

en: Then the LORD appeared to Abram and said, "To your offspring I will give this land." So he built there an altar to the LORD, who had appeared to him.
zh: 耶和華向亞伯蘭顯現，說：“我要把這地賜給你的後裔。”亞伯蘭就在那裡為向他顯現的耶和華築了一座祭壇。

en: From there he moved to the hill country on the east of Bethel and pitched his tent, with Bethel on the west and Ai on the east. And there he built an altar to the LORD and called upon the name of the LORD.
zh: 後來他從那裡遷到伯特利東邊的山地，搭起帳棚。西邊是伯特利，東邊是艾城；他在那裡也為耶和華築了一座祭壇，呼求耶和華的名。

en: And Abram journeyed on, still going toward the Negeb.
zh: 亞伯蘭又起程，漸漸移到南地去。

en: Now there was a famine in the land. So Abram went down to Egypt to sojourn there, for the famine was severe in the land.
zh: 當時，那地發生饑荒，亞伯蘭就下到埃及去，要在那裡寄居；因為那地的饑荒十分嚴重。

en: When he was about to enter Egypt, he said to Sarai his wife, "I know that you are a woman beautiful in appearance,
zh: 快要到達埃及的時候，亞伯蘭對他的妻子撒萊說：“看哪，我知道你是個美貌的女人。

en: and when the Egyptians see you, they will say, 'This is his wife.' Then they will kill me, but they will let you live.
zh: 埃及人看見你的時候，必會說：‘這是他的妻子’，他們就會殺我，卻叫你活著。

en: Say you are my sister, that it may go well with me because of you, and that my life may be spared for your sake."
zh: 請你說你是我的妹妹，使我因你的緣故可以平安無事，我的性命也可以因你的緣故得以保全。”

en: When Abram entered Egypt, the Egyptians saw that the woman was very beautiful.
zh: 果然，亞伯蘭進入埃及的時候，埃及人就注視那女人，因為她十分美麗。

en: And when the princes of Pharaoh saw her, they praised her to Pharaoh. And the woman was taken into Pharaoh's house.
zh: 法老的一些大臣看見了撒萊，就在法老面前稱讚她；於是那女人被帶進法老的宮裡去。

en: And for her sake he dealt well with Abram; and he had sheep, oxen, male donkeys, male servants, female servants, female donkeys, and camels.
zh: 亞伯蘭因這女人的緣故就被優待，得了許多牛羊、公驢、母驢、僕婢和駱駝。

en: But the LORD afflicted Pharaoh and his house with great plagues because of Sarai, Abram's wife.
zh: 耶和華因為亞伯蘭的妻子撒萊的緣故，就用嚴重的災病打擊法老和他的全家。

en: So Pharaoh called Abram and said, "What is this you have done to me? Why did you not tell me that she was your wife?
zh: 於是，法老把亞伯蘭召了來，對他說：“你向我作的是甚麼？你為甚麼不告訴我她是你的妻子呢？

en: Why did you say, 'She is my sister,' so that I took her for my wife? Now then, here is your wife; take her, and go."
zh: 你為甚麼說她是你的妹妹，以致我娶了她作妻子呢？現在，你的妻子在這裡，帶她走吧！”

en: And Pharaoh gave men orders concerning him, and they sent him away with his wife and all that he had.
zh: 法老為了亞伯蘭的事吩咐臣僕，他們就把亞伯蘭和他的妻子，以及他所有的一切都送走了。
